---
title: "Correlation_analysis"
author: "Savanah Leidholt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
.libPaths("~/leidholt/R")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Hmisc)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyselect)
library(utils)
library(purrr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(labelled)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(pheatmap)
library(patchwork)
```


```{r}
dat <- readRDS("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/Data/R_objects/omics_wide_union_baseline.rds")

top_prots <- read_csv(
  "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/Results/enriched_proteins/elasticnet_plasma_top100_signatures_MAPPED_SYMBOLS_ONLY.csv"
)

annot <- read_csv("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/Data/analyte_data/analytes.csv")
```

```{r}
meta <- dat %>% dplyr::select(1:14)

expr <- dat %>%
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(names(meta))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric))

needed_meta <- c("record_id", "group", "hba1c", "acr_u", "age", "sex", "bmi") #add in egfr data once I have it for attempt
stopifnot(all(needed_meta %in% names(meta)))
```

```{r}
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    group_chr  = as.character(group),
    group_low  = str_to_lower(group_chr),
    group_code = case_when(
      str_detect(group_low, "type\\s*1") ~ "T1D",
      str_detect(group_low, "type\\s*2") ~ "T2D",
      str_detect(group_low, "lean")      ~ "LC",
      str_detect(group_low, "obese")     ~ "OC",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

meta %>% count(group_chr, group_code) %>% print(n = 50)
meta %>% filter(is.na(group_code)) %>% distinct(group_chr) %>% print(n = 50)
```



```{r}
map_tbl <- annot %>%
  transmute(
    seq_id      = AptName,           # e.g. "seq.10001.7"
    gene_symbol = EntrezGeneSymbol   # e.g. "RAF1"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    seq_id      = as.character(seq_id),
    gene_symbol = as.character(gene_symbol),
    gene_symbol = na_if(gene_symbol, ""),
    gene_symbol = if_else(is.na(gene_symbol), seq_id, gene_symbol)
  ) %>%
  distinct(seq_id, gene_symbol)
```



```{r}
corr_df <- bind_cols(meta, expr) %>%
  rename(HbA1c = hba1c, uACR = acr_u) %>%
  mutate(
    HbA1c = as.numeric(HbA1c),
    uACR  = as.numeric(uACR),
    age   = as.numeric(age),
    sex   = as.factor(sex),
    BMI   = as.numeric(bmi)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(HbA1c) & !is.na(uACR))

keep_cols <- names(meta)
prot_cols <- setdiff(names(corr_df), c(keep_cols, "HbA1c", "uACR", "BMI"))

corr_df <- corr_df %>% mutate(across(all_of(prot_cols), ~log2(.x + 1)))
```


```{r}
contrast_list <- c("T1D_vs_LC","T2D_vs_LC","T1D_vs_T2D","T2D_vs_OC","T1D_vs_OC","OC_vs_LC")

get_groups_from_contrast <- function(contrast_name) {
  strsplit(contrast_name, "_vs_")[[1]]
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------
#marginal correlations analysis
#--------------------------------
cor_test_one <- function(df, outcome, protein, method = "spearman", min_n = 10) {
  x <- df[[outcome]]
  y <- df[[protein]]
  ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y) & !is.na(x) & !is.na(y)
  n <- sum(ok)

  if (n < min_n) return(tibble(n = n, rho = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))

  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x[ok], y[ok], method = method, exact = FALSE))
  tibble(n = n, rho = unname(ct$estimate), p_value = ct$p.value)
}

run_contrast_correlation <- function(contrast_name, corr_df, top_prots, min_n = 10) {

  groups <- get_groups_from_contrast(contrast_name)
  df_sub <- corr_df %>% filter(group_code %in% groups)

  prots <- top_prots %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    as.character()

  prots <- intersect(prots, colnames(df_sub))

  message("---- marginal: ", contrast_name, " ----")
  message("subset N samples: ", nrow(df_sub))
  message("subset N proteins: ", length(prots))

  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0 || length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  prots <- prots[sapply(df_sub[, prots, drop = FALSE], function(v) sd(v, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)]
  if (length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  tidyr::crossing(outcome = c("HbA1c","uACR", "BMI"), protein = prots) %>%
    mutate(stats = purrr::map2(outcome, protein, ~cor_test_one(df_sub, .x, .y, min_n = min_n))) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(stats) %>%
    mutate(contrast = contrast_name) %>%
    group_by(contrast, outcome) %>%
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    ungroup()
}

all_cor_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  contrast_list,
  ~run_contrast_correlation(.x, corr_df, top_prots, min_n = 10)
)

all_cor_results %>% arrange(contrast, outcome, FDR) %>% print(n = 30)
```


```{r}
#-----------------------------
# Partial correlations setup
#-----------------------------

partial_outcomes <- c("HbA1c", "uACR", "BMI")   # later: add "eGFR_fas_cr", "bmi" if they exist
partial_covars   <- c("age", "sex")
stopifnot(all(partial_covars %in% names(corr_df)))

get_partial_cor <- function(df, protein, outcome, covars, min_n = 15) {

  vars_needed <- c(protein, outcome, covars)
  sub_df <- df[, vars_needed, drop = FALSE]
  sub_df <- sub_df[complete.cases(sub_df), , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(sub_df) < min_n) {
    return(tibble(n = nrow(sub_df), rho = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
  }

  fit_p <- lm(as.formula(paste(protein, "~", paste(covars, collapse = "+"))), data = sub_df)
  fit_y <- lm(as.formula(paste(outcome, "~", paste(covars, collapse = "+"))), data = sub_df)

  res_p <- resid(fit_p)
  res_y <- resid(fit_y)

  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(res_p, res_y, method = "spearman"))
  tibble(n = nrow(sub_df), rho = unname(ct$estimate), p_value = ct$p.value)
}

run_contrast_partial <- function(contrast_name, corr_df, top_prots,
                                 outcomes = partial_outcomes,
                                 covars = partial_covars,
                                 min_n = 15) {

  groups <- get_groups_from_contrast(contrast_name)
  df_sub <- corr_df %>% filter(group_code %in% groups)

  prots <- top_prots %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    as.character()

  prots <- intersect(prots, colnames(df_sub))

  message("---- partial: ", contrast_name, " ----")
  message("subset N samples: ", nrow(df_sub))
  message("subset N proteins: ", length(prots))

  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0 || length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  prots <- prots[sapply(df_sub[, prots, drop = FALSE], function(v) sd(v, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)]
  if (length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  tidyr::crossing(outcome = outcomes, protein = prots) %>%
    mutate(stats = purrr::map2(outcome, protein, ~get_partial_cor(df_sub, .y, .x, covars = covars, min_n = min_n))) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(stats) %>%
    mutate(contrast = contrast_name) %>%
    group_by(contrast, outcome) %>%
    mutate(FDR = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    ungroup()
}

all_partial_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  contrast_list,
  ~run_contrast_partial(.x, corr_df, top_prots, outcomes = partial_outcomes, covars = partial_covars, min_n = 15)
)

all_partial_results %>% arrange(contrast, outcome, FDR) %>% print(n = 30)
```

```{r}
cor_gene <- all_cor_results %>%
  left_join(map_tbl, by = c("protein" = "seq_id")) %>%
  mutate(gene_symbol = if_else(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "", protein, gene_symbol)) %>%
  group_by(contrast, outcome, gene_symbol) %>%
  summarise(
    rho = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_value = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    FDR = min(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = max(n, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(label = gene_symbol)

partial_gene <- all_partial_results %>%
  left_join(map_tbl, by = c("protein" = "seq_id")) %>%
  mutate(gene_symbol = if_else(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "", protein, gene_symbol)) %>%
  group_by(contrast, outcome, gene_symbol) %>%
  summarise(
    rho = mean(rho, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_value = min(p_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    FDR = min(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = max(n, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(label = gene_symbol)
```


```{r}
plot_ranked_cor <- function(data, contrast_name, outcome_name, top_n = 15, show_key = FALSE) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name, outcome == outcome_name) %>%
    filter(is.finite(rho)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(rho))) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(
      direction = ifelse(rho > 0, "Positive", "Negative"),
      signif_label = case_when(
        !is.na(FDR) & FDR <= 0.001 ~ "***",
        !is.na(FDR) & FDR <= 0.01  ~ "**",
        !is.na(FDR) & FDR <= 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      ylab = reorder(label, rho)
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = paste(contrast_name, outcome_name, "(no data)")))
  }

  xpad <- 0.12
  xmin <- min(df$rho, na.rm = TRUE) - xpad
  xmax <- max(df$rho, na.rm = TRUE) + xpad

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = rho, y = ylab, fill = direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = signif_label),
      hjust = ifelse(df$rho > 0, -0.2, 1.2),
      size = 4
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Positive" = "firebrick", "Negative" = "steelblue")) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(contrast_name, " (", outcome_name, ")"),
      x = "Partial Spearman rho (age + sex adjusted)",
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Direction"
    ) +
    xlim(xmin, xmax)

  if (show_key) {
    # (Optional) if you ever want it inside a single plot:
    p <- p +
      coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
      theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 45, 5.5, 5.5)) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = -Inf,
        label = "FDR:  * ≤ 0.05   ** ≤ 0.01   *** ≤ 0.001",
        hjust = 1.05, vjust = -1.2, size = 3.2
      )
  }

  p
}
```

```{r}
fdr_key_plot <- ggplot() +
  annotate("label",
           x = 1, y = 1,
           label = "FDR key\n*  ≤ 0.05\n** ≤ 0.01\n*** ≤ 0.001",
           hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3.2) +
  xlim(0, 1) + ylim(0, 1) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
plot_partial_panel <- function(contrast_name, top_n = 15) {
  P1 <- plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, contrast_name, "HbA1c", top_n = top_n, show_key = FALSE)
  P2 <- plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, contrast_name, "uACR",  top_n = top_n, show_key = FALSE)
  P3 <- plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, contrast_name, "BMI",   top_n = top_n, show_key = FALSE)

  (P1 | P2 | P3) +
    plot_annotation(title = paste0("Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted): ", contrast_name)) +
    inset_element(fdr_key_plot, left = 0.72, bottom = 0.02, right = 0.98, top = 0.28)
}
```



```{r}
plot_partial_panel("T1D_vs_LC", top_n = 15)
plot_partial_panel("T1D_vs_OC", top_n = 15)
plot_partial_panel("T1D_vs_T2D", top_n = 15)
plot_partial_panel("T2D_vs_LC", top_n = 15)
plot_partial_panel("T2D_vs_OC", top_n = 15)
plot_partial_panel("OC_vs_LC", top_n = 15)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------
# Interaction models
# Tests whether protein-trait slopes differ by group
#--------------------------------

get_interaction_test <- function(df, protein, outcome, group_var = "group_code",
                                 covars = c("age", "sex"), min_n = 15) {

  vars_needed <- c(protein, outcome, group_var, covars)
  sub_df <- df[, vars_needed, drop = FALSE]
  sub_df <- sub_df[complete.cases(sub_df), , drop = FALSE]

  # Need enough samples and both groups represented
  if (nrow(sub_df) < min_n) {
    return(tibble(
      n = nrow(sub_df),
      beta_protein = NA_real_,
      beta_group = NA_real_,
      beta_interaction = NA_real_,
      p_protein = NA_real_,
      p_group = NA_real_,
      p_interaction = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  if (length(unique(sub_df[[group_var]])) < 2) {
    return(tibble(
      n = nrow(sub_df),
      beta_protein = NA_real_,
      beta_group = NA_real_,
      beta_interaction = NA_real_,
      p_protein = NA_real_,
      p_group = NA_real_,
      p_interaction = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  sub_df[[group_var]] <- droplevels(as.factor(sub_df[[group_var]]))

  form <- as.formula(
    paste(outcome, "~", protein, "*", group_var, "+", paste(covars, collapse = " + "))
  )

  fit <- lm(form, data = sub_df)
  sm <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  coef_names <- rownames(sm)

  # protein main effect
  protein_row <- protein

  # group main effect row usually looks like group_codeT2D
  group_row <- coef_names[grepl(paste0("^", group_var), coef_names) &
                            !grepl(":", coef_names)]

  # interaction row usually looks like protein:group_codeT2D OR group_codeT2D:protein
  interaction_row <- coef_names[
    grepl(protein, coef_names) &
      grepl(group_var, coef_names) &
      grepl(":", coef_names)
  ]

  tibble(
    n = nrow(sub_df),
    beta_protein = if (protein_row %in% coef_names) sm[protein_row, "Estimate"] else NA_real_,
    beta_group = if (length(group_row) > 0) sm[group_row[1], "Estimate"] else NA_real_,
    beta_interaction = if (length(interaction_row) > 0) sm[interaction_row[1], "Estimate"] else NA_real_,
    p_protein = if (protein_row %in% coef_names) sm[protein_row, "Pr(>|t|)"] else NA_real_,
    p_group = if (length(group_row) > 0) sm[group_row[1], "Pr(>|t|)"] else NA_real_,
    p_interaction = if (length(interaction_row) > 0) sm[interaction_row[1], "Pr(>|t|)"] else NA_real_
  )
}
```


```{r}
run_contrast_interaction <- function(contrast_name, corr_df, top_prots,
                                     outcomes = c("HbA1c", "uACR", "BMI"),
                                     covars = c("age", "sex"),
                                     min_n = 15) {

  groups <- get_groups_from_contrast(contrast_name)
  df_sub <- corr_df %>% filter(group_code %in% groups)

  # Make first group the reference level
  df_sub <- df_sub %>%
    mutate(group_code = factor(group_code, levels = groups))

  prots <- top_prots %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    as.character()

  prots <- intersect(prots, colnames(df_sub))

  message("---- interaction: ", contrast_name, " ----")
  message("subset N samples: ", nrow(df_sub))
  message("subset N proteins: ", length(prots))

  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0 || length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  prots <- prots[sapply(df_sub[, prots, drop = FALSE], function(v) sd(v, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)]
  if (length(prots) == 0) return(NULL)

  tidyr::crossing(outcome = outcomes, protein = prots) %>%
    mutate(
      stats = purrr::map2(
        protein, outcome,
        ~get_interaction_test(df_sub, protein = .x, outcome = .y,
                              group_var = "group_code", covars = covars, min_n = min_n)
      )
    ) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(stats) %>%
    mutate(contrast = contrast_name) %>%
    group_by(contrast, outcome) %>%
    mutate(FDR_interaction = p.adjust(p_interaction, method = "BH")) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```



```{r}
all_interaction_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  contrast_list,
  ~run_contrast_interaction(.x, corr_df, top_prots,
                            outcomes = c("HbA1c", "uACR", "BMI"),
                            covars = c("age", "sex"),
                            min_n = 15)
)

all_interaction_results %>%
  arrange(contrast, outcome, FDR_interaction) %>%
  print(n = 50)
```


```{r}
interaction_gene <- all_interaction_results %>%
  left_join(map_tbl, by = c("protein" = "seq_id")) %>%
  mutate(gene_symbol = if_else(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "", protein, gene_symbol)) %>%
  group_by(contrast, outcome, gene_symbol) %>%
  summarise(
    beta_interaction = mean(beta_interaction, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_interaction = min(p_interaction, na.rm = TRUE),
    FDR_interaction = min(FDR_interaction, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = max(n, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(label = gene_symbol)
```

```{r}
plot_ranked_interaction <- function(data, contrast_name, outcome_name, top_n = 15) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name, outcome == outcome_name) %>%
    filter(is.finite(beta_interaction)) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(beta_interaction))) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    mutate(
      direction = ifelse(beta_interaction > 0, "Stronger in 2nd Group", "Stronger in 1st Group"),
      signif_label = case_when(
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.001 ~ "***",
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.01  ~ "**",
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      ylab = reorder(label, beta_interaction)
    )

  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = paste(contrast_name, outcome_name, "(no data)")))
  }

  ggplot(df, aes(x = beta_interaction, y = ylab, fill = direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = signif_label),
      hjust = ifelse(df$beta_interaction > 0, -0.2, 1.2),
      size = 4
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste0(contrast_name, " (", outcome_name, ")"),
      x = "Interaction beta (difference in slope between groups)",
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Slope pattern"
    )
}
```


```{r}
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "T2D_vs_OC", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
plot_ranked_interaction(interaction_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "HbA1c", top_n = 15)
```
```{r}
library(pheatmap)

plot_trait_heatmap <- function(data, contrast_name, proteins = NULL) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name)

  if(!is.null(proteins)) {
    df <- df %>% filter(label %in% proteins)
  }

  mat <- df %>%
    select(label, outcome, rho) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = outcome, values_from = rho) %>%
    column_to_rownames("label") %>%
    as.matrix()

  pheatmap(
    mat,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("steelblue","white","firebrick"))(100),
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    border_color = NA,
    main = paste("Protein–trait correlations:", contrast_name)
  )
}
```

```{r}
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_LC")
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_OC")
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D")
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_LC")
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_OC")
plot_trait_heatmap(partial_gene, "OC_vs_LC")
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(pheatmap)

plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap <- function(corr_df, top_prots, contrast_name,
                                               map_tbl = NULL,
                                               scale_rows = TRUE,
                                               cluster_rows = TRUE,
                                               cluster_cols = FALSE,
                                               show_colnames = FALSE) {

  groups <- get_groups_from_contrast(contrast_name)

  # subset samples to the two groups in the contrast
  df_sub <- corr_df %>%
    filter(group_code %in% groups) %>%
    mutate(group_code = factor(group_code, levels = groups)) %>%
    arrange(group_code)

  # pull elastic net proteins for this contrast
  prots <- top_prots %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    pull(feature_id) %>%
    unique() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    as.character()

  # keep only proteins present in expression data
  prots <- intersect(prots, colnames(df_sub))

  if (length(prots) == 0) {
    stop("No elastic net proteins found in corr_df for this contrast.")
  }

  # expression matrix: rows = proteins, cols = samples
  mat <- df_sub %>%
    select(all_of(prots)) %>%
    as.matrix()

  rownames(mat) <- df_sub$record_id
  mat <- t(mat)

  # optional relabel rows with gene symbols
  if (!is.null(map_tbl)) {
    row_labels <- map_tbl %>%
      filter(seq_id %in% rownames(mat)) %>%
      distinct(seq_id, gene_symbol)

    label_vec <- setNames(row_labels$gene_symbol, row_labels$seq_id)
    new_names <- label_vec[rownames(mat)]
    new_names[is.na(new_names) | new_names == ""] <- rownames(mat)[is.na(new_names) | new_names == ""]
    rownames(mat) <- make.unique(new_names)
  }

  # z-score by protein
  if (scale_rows) {
    mat <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  }

  # column annotation
  ann_col <- data.frame(Group = df_sub$group_code)
  rownames(ann_col) <- df_sub$record_id

  # add a visible split between groups
  group_counts <- table(df_sub$group_code)
  gap_positions <- cumsum(group_counts)

  pheatmap(
    mat,
    annotation_col = ann_col,
    cluster_rows = cluster_rows,
    cluster_cols = cluster_cols,
    show_colnames = show_colnames,
    border_color = NA,
    gaps_col = gap_positions[-length(gap_positions)],
    main = paste0("Elastic net protein expression: ", contrast_name)
  )
}
```

```{r}
plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_T2D",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_LC",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```
```{r}
plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "T1D_vs_OC",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```
```{r}
plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_LC",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```
```{r}

plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "T2D_vs_OC",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```
```{r}

plot_elasticnet_expression_heatmap(
  corr_df = corr_df,
  top_prots = top_prots,
  contrast_name = "OC_vs_LC",
  map_tbl = map_tbl,
  scale_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
plot_interaction_panel <- function(data, contrast_name, top_n = 10) {

  df <- data %>%
    filter(contrast == contrast_name) %>%
    filter(is.finite(beta_interaction)) %>%
    group_by(outcome) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(beta_interaction)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      direction = ifelse(beta_interaction > 0,
                         "Stronger slope in 2nd group",
                         "Stronger slope in 1st group"),
      signif_label = case_when(
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.001 ~ "***",
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.01  ~ "**",
        !is.na(FDR_interaction) & FDR_interaction <= 0.05  ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      label = reorder(label, beta_interaction)
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(x = beta_interaction, y = label, fill = direction)) +
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = signif_label),
      hjust = ifelse(df$beta_interaction > 0, -0.2, 1.2),
      size = 4
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "Stronger slope in 1st group" = "steelblue",
      "Stronger slope in 2nd group" = "firebrick"
    )) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Protein × Group interactions: ", contrast_name),
      x = "Difference in slope between groups",
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Group with stronger association"
    )
}
```


```{r fig.width=10}
plot_interaction_panel(interaction_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", top_n = 15)
```









```{r}
# Marginal correlations (raw)
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "BMI")


# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_LC", "BMI")

```
```{r}
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "BMI")


# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_OC", "BMI")
```
```{r}
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "BMI")


# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T1D_vs_T2D", "BMI")
```


```{r}
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "BMI")


# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_LC", "BMI")
```
```{r}
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_OC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_CC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "T2D_vs_CC", "BMI")

# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_OC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_OC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "T2D_vs_OC", "BMI")
```
```{r}
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(cor_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "BMI")


# Partial correlations (age + sex adjusted)
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "HbA1c")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "uACR")
plot_ranked_cor(partial_gene, "OC_vs_LC", "BMI")

```


```{r}
beta_rho <- all_cor_results %>%
  left_join(top_prots %>% select(feature_id, contrast, beta),
            by = c("protein" = "feature_id", "contrast")) %>%
  filter(is.finite(beta), is.finite(rho))

# HbA1c
stats_hba1c <- beta_rho %>%
  filter(outcome == "HbA1c") %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  summarise(beta_rho_cor = round(cor(beta, method = "spearman", rho, use = "complete.obs"), 2), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(beta_rho %>% filter(outcome == "HbA1c"),
       aes(x = beta, y = rho)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "blue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~contrast) +
  geom_text(data = stats_hba1c,
            aes(label = paste0("r = ", beta_rho_cor), x = -Inf, y = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 4) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Elastic Net Beta vs Spearman Rho (HbA1c)", x = "Elastic Net beta", y = "Spearman rho")

# uACR
stats_uacr <- beta_rho %>%
  filter(outcome == "uACR") %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  summarise(beta_rho_cor = round(cor(beta, method = "spearman", rho, use = "complete.obs"), 2), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(beta_rho %>% filter(outcome == "uACR"),
       aes(x = beta, y = rho)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "red") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~contrast) +
  geom_text(data = stats_uacr,
            aes(label = paste0("r = ", beta_rho_cor), x = -Inf, y = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 4) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Elastic Net Beta vs Spearman Rho (uACR)", x = "Elastic Net beta", y = "Spearman rho")

#BMI
stats_BMI <- beta_rho %>%
  filter(outcome == "BMI") %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  summarise(beta_rho_cor = round(cor(beta, method = "spearman", rho, use = "complete.obs"), 2), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(beta_rho %>% filter(outcome == "BMI"),
       aes(x = beta, y = rho)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, color = "purple") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~contrast) +
  geom_text(data = stats_BMI,
            aes(label = paste0("r = ", beta_rho_cor), x = -Inf, y = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.2, size = 4) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Elastic Net Beta vs Spearman Rho (BMI)", x = "Elastic Net beta", y = "Spearman rho")
```
```{r}
# UpSet (presence/absence)
upset_df <- top_prots %>%
  distinct(feature_id, contrast) %>%
  mutate(value = 1) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = contrast, values_from = value, values_fill = 0)

upset_input <- as.data.frame(upset_df)
rownames(upset_input) <- upset_input$feature_id
upset_input$feature_id <- NULL

UpSetR::upset(
  upset_input,
  sets = contrast_list,
  order.by = "freq",
  keep.order = TRUE,
  mainbar.y.label = "Intersection size",
  sets.x.label = "Proteins per contrast"
)
```
